SoftwareFailure.Description: TCM: Software failure using module interface

SystemStatus.Description: TCM: Test failure, system status not correct

TimeoutFailure.Description: TCM: Timeout waiting for test comditions

VehicleNotConnected.Description: TCM: Vehicle not connected to tester

VINMismatch.Description: TCM VIN does not match scanned VIN

ModuleFault_0562.Description: Low Ignition Voltage at TCM for an Extended Period

ModuleFault_0563.Description: High Ignition Voltage at TCM for an Extended Period

ModuleFault_0658.Description: High Side Driver Actuator Supply Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_0659.Description: High Side Driver Actuator Supply Circuit High Voltage

ModuleFault_0667.Description: TCM Internal Substrate Temp Thermistor Performance Failure

ModuleFault_0668.Description: TCM Internal Substrate Temp Thermistor Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_0669.Description: TCM Internal Substrate Temp Thermistor Circuit High Voltage

ModuleFault_06AD.Description: TCM Power-Up Thermistor Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_06AE.Description: TCM Power-Up Thermistor Circuit High Voltage

ModuleFault_0717.Description: Speed Sensor TISS Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_071A.Description: Trans Mode Switch A Circuit (Tow / Haul Winter Mode)

ModuleFault_0722.Description: Speed Sensor TOSS Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_0751.Description: Mode 2 Stuck OFF (Shift Solenoid Valve A)

ModuleFault_0752.Description: Mode 2 Stuck ON (Shift Solenoid Valve A)

ModuleFault_0756.Description: Mode 3 Stuck OFF (Shift Solenoid Valve B)

ModuleFault_0776.Description: RVT C35R Stuck OFF (PC Solenoid B)

ModuleFault_0777.Description: RVT C35R Stuck ON (PC Solenoid B)

ModuleFault_0796.Description: RVT C456 Stuck OFF (PC Solenoid C)

ModuleFault_0797.Description: RVT C456 Stuck ON (PC Solenoid C)

ModuleFault_0842.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors C35R Circuit Low Voltage (TFP Sensor 2 / A)

ModuleFault_0843.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors C35R Circuit High Voltage (TFP Sensor 2 / A)

ModuleFault_0872.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors CB26 Circuit Low Voltage (TFP Sensor 3 / C)

ModuleFault_0873.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors CB26 Circuit High Voltage (TFP Sensor 3 / C)

ModuleFault_0877.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors C1234 Circuit Low Voltage (TFP Sensor 1 / D)

ModuleFault_0878.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors C1234 Circuit High Voltage (TFP Sensor 1 / D)

ModuleFault_0961.Description: VBS PC Solenoid A Control Circuit Rationality Test (Line Pressure)

ModuleFault_0962.Description: VBS PC Solenoid A Control Circuit Low Voltage (Line Pressure)

ModuleFault_0963.Description: VBS PC Solenoid A Control Circuit High Voltage (Line Pressure)

ModuleFault_0965.Description: VBS PC Solenoid B Control Circuit Rationality Test (C3 / C35R / CLCH A)

ModuleFault_0967.Description: VBS PC Solenoid B Control Circuit High Voltage (C3 / C35R / CLCH A)

ModuleFault_0969.Description: VBS PC Solenoid C Control Circuit Rationality Test (C2,C5 / C456 / CLCH B)

ModuleFault_0970.Description: VBS PC Solenoid C Control Circuit Low Voltage (C2,C5 / C456 / CLCH B)

ModuleFault_0971.Description: VBS PC Solenoid C Control Circuit High Voltage (C2,C5 / C456 / CLCH B)

ModuleFault_0973.Description: Mode 2 Control Circuit Low Voltage (Shift Solenoid A)

ModuleFault_0974.Description: Mode 2 Control Circuit High Voltage (Shift Solenoid A)

ModuleFault_0976.Description: Mode 3 Control Circuit Low Voltage (Shift Solenoid B)

ModuleFault_0977.Description: Mode 3 Control Circuit High Voltage (Shift Solenoid B)

ModuleFault_0989.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors C456/CBR1 Circuit Low Voltage (TFP Sensor 4 / E)

ModuleFault_0990.Description: Pressure Switch Sensors C456/CBR1 Circuit High Voltage (TFP Sensor 4 / E)

ModuleFault_1761.Description: TUTD Switch Signal Circuit, Rolling Count

ModuleFault_1762.Description: Trans Mode Switch Signal Circuit, Rolling Count

ModuleFault_182E.Description: IMS Circuit A Low, Reported as IMS - Invalid Range

ModuleFault_1915.Description: IMS Does Not Indicate Park/Neutral During Start

ModuleFault_2534.Description: Ignition Switch Run / Start Position Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_2535.Description: Ignition Switch Run / Start Position Circuit High Voltage

ModuleFault_2537.Description: Ignition Switch Accesory Position Circuit Low Voltage

ModuleFault_2714.Description: RVT CB26 Stuck OFF (PC Solenoid D)

ModuleFault_2715.Description: RVT CB26 Stuck ON (PC Solenoid D)

ModuleFault_2719.Description: VBS PC Solenoid D Control Circuit Rationality Test (C4 / CB26 / CLCH C)

ModuleFault_2720.Description: VBS PC Solenoid D Control Circuit Low Voltage (C4 / CB26 / CLCH C)

ModuleFault_2721.Description: VBS PC Solenoid D Control Circuit High Voltage (C4 / CB26 / CLCH C)

ModuleFault_2724.Description: RVT C1234 Stuck ON (PC Solenoid E)
